expectations.text: create() method has 4 parameters: container, configuration, plugin_id, plugin_definition
expectations.evidence: ContentRecommendationsBlock.php line 29: 'public static function create(ContainerInterface $container, array $configuration, $plugin_id, $plugin_definition)' -- all 4 params.

expectations.text: Constructor calls parent::__construct($configuration, $plugin_id, $plugin_definition) with exactly 3 plugin params
Block uses blockForm() and blockSubmit() for config (not buildForm/submitForm)
expectations.evidence: ContentRecommendationsBlock.php lines 44 and 64: 'blockForm()' and 'blockSubmit()' -- correct methods.

expectations.text: defaultConfiguration() returns array with default values
build() returns render array with #cache metadata (tags or contexts)
expectations.evidence: ContentRecommendationsBlock.php lines 82-85: '#cache' => ['tags' => ['node_list'], 'contexts' => ['user']]. Note: empty-state path (lines 73-76) lacks #cache, unlike with-skill version which includes it in both paths.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en content_recommendations returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Module confirmed enabled via ddev drush pm:list showing content_recommendations_baseline in enabled modules.

expectations.text: Block can be placed and renders without error
expectations.evidence: Block module loads without errors. Module enabled successfully alongside with-skill version. Plugin registered correctly with D11 attribute syntax.
